posts.community: OBSC Perfection Ltd - Perfection Not Just in Name, but in Business DNA
posts.text: Someone should compile questions related to man-hours, contractual job work & its corresponding wage discrepancies. They are to have their concall today at 2:00 pm onwards. Since they do concall only once in a year , someone with experience of engaging with managements should get on the concall & ask the relevant doubts. Link to register: services.choruscall.in Diamond Pass Registration https://nsearchives.nseindia.com/corporate/OBSCPERFECTION_15052026172609_Disclosure_Investor_Meet_21_May_2026.pdf
